meaning: n.(=harem)(伊斯兰教徒)女眷居住的内室,闺房,(伊斯兰教徒的)女眷,共配一雄的一群雌性动物
examples: Boko Haram gunmen also shot a police inspector.
The police said they'd shot dead three members of Boko Haram and recovered a gun.
But the links have not been proved and little is known about groups such as Boko Haram.
He is the most senior security official to be killed by Boko Haram so far.
It does not offer much hope for dealing comprehensively with the underlying causes of the Boko Haram phenomenon.
